---
title: "regressions"
author: "Carolina Carreira"
date: ''
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(ordinal)
library(lme4)
library(dplyr)
library(car)
library(sjPlot)
library(performance)
library(broom)
library(EMT)
library(multcomp)
library(emmeans)
library(RVAideMemoire)
library(ggplot2)
library(MASS)
library(sjPlot) 

ENCODING = 'UTF-8'

```


## Medical complex

```{r}
scores <- read.csv('./data/followup/scores-medc.csv', encoding=ENCODING,  header = TRUE)
scores$gender <- as.factor(scores$gender)
scores$age <- as.factor(scores$age)
scores$combined_IoT_Experience <- as.factor(scores$combined_IoT_Experience)
scores$combined_Medical_Experience <- as.factor(scores$combined_Medical_Experience)
scores$combined_CS_Experience <- as.factor(scores$combined_CS_Experience)
scores$education <- as.factor(scores$education)
scores$scenario_scenario <- as.factor(scores$scenario_scenario)
scores$scenario_complexity <- as.factor(scores$scenario_complexity)
names(scores) <- gsub(" ", "_", names(scores))  # Replace spaces with underscores


scores$safety_people <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_people, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_data <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_data, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_companyHospital <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_companyHospital, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_purpose <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_purpose, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_tee <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_tee, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))

scores$willingness <- ordered(scores$willingness, levels = c("Would not", "Maybe would", "Definitely would"))


scores$safety_overall_init <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_overall_init, levels = c("Not at all safe", "Somewhat safe","Completely safe")))
scores$safety_overall_post <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_overall_post, levels = c("Not at all safe", "Somewhat safe","Completely safe")))

scores$scenario <- factor(scores$scenario)

scores$EXPLN <- factor(scores$EXPLN, levels = c("No explanation", "Unsubstantial", "Hardware", "Trust"))
scores$FAQ <- factor(scores$FAQ, levels = c("No FAQ", "Hide", "Show"))
scores$scenario <- factor(scores$scenario, levels = c("MedicalComplex", "MedicalSimple", "IoTComplex", "IoTSimple"))
scores$EXPLN_rebinned <- factor(scores$EXPLN_rebinned)
scores$FAQ_rebinned <- factor(scores$FAQ_rebinned)

scores_medicalc = scores
    

#scores$safety_companyHospital <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_companyHospital,                                       levels = c("Safe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Unsafe")))

```

```{r}
regression_model_binary <- function(dependent_var) {
  formula_str <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ EXPLN + FAQ + combined_Medical_Experience + combined_CS_Experience"))
  model <- glm(formula_str, data = scores, family = binomial)
  print(summary(model))
  print(Anova(model))
  plot_model(model)
  return(model)
}

model_complex <- function(dependent_var) {
  formula_str <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ EXPLN + FAQ + combined_Medical_Experience + combined_CS_Experience"))
  
  model_output <- clm(formula_str, data = scores, Hess=TRUE)
  print(model_output)
  print(summary(model_output))
  return()
}

test_proportional_odds_old <- function(dependent_var) {
  data <- regression_results
  formula_str <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ EXPLN + FAQ + combined_Medical_Experience + combined_CS_Experience"))
  model_clm <- clm(formula_str, data = scores, Hess = TRUE, nAGQ = 10)
  polr_model <- polr(formula_str, data = scores, Hess = TRUE)
  brant_result <- brant(polr_model)
  print(brant_result)
  p_values <- brant_result[, "probability"]
  cat("\nBrant Test Results:\n")
  print(brant_result)
  if (any(p_values < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    cat("\nThe Proportional Odds Assumption does NOT hold for at least one predictor.\n")
    cat("Consider using a partial proportional odds model or another approach.\n")
  } else {
    cat("\nThe Proportional Odds Assumption holds for all predictors.\n")
  }
}

test_proportional_odds <- function(dependent_var) {
  data <- regression_results
  formula_str <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ EXPLN + FAQ + combined_Medical_Experience + combined_CS_Experience"))
  model_clm <- clm(formula_str, data = scores, Hess = TRUE, nAGQ = 10)
  polr_model <- polr(formula_str, data = scores, Hess = TRUE)
  brant_result <- brant(polr_model)
  print(brant_result)
  p_values <- brant_result[, "probability"]
  cat("\nBrant Test Results:\n")
  print(brant_result)
  if (any(p_values < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    cat("\nThe Proportional Odds Assumption does NOT hold for at least one predictor.\n")
    cat("Consider using a partial proportional odds model or another approach.\n")
  } else {
    cat("\nThe Proportional Odds Assumption holds for all predictors.\n")
  }
}

test_proportional_odds_lrt <- function(dependent_var) {
  # Define the data and the formula for the model
  data <- regression_results
  formula_str <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ EXPLN + FAQ + combined_Medical_Experience + combined_CS_Experience"))
  
  # Fit the proportional odds model using clm
  model_full_po <- clm(formula_str, data = scores, Hess = TRUE, nAGQ = 10)
  
  # Fit the non-proportional odds model using vglm
  model_partial_po <- vglm(formula_str, family = cumulative(parallel = FALSE), data = scores)
  
  # Calculate AIC values for both models
  aic_full <- AIC(model_full_po)
  aic_partial <- AIC(model_partial_po)
  
  # Print AIC values for comparison
  cat("\nAIC of full proportional odds model (clm):", aic_full)
  cat("\nAIC of partial proportional odds model (vglm):", aic_partial, "\n")
  
  # Compare the models
  if (aic_partial < aic_full) {
    cat("\nThe partial proportional odds model (vglm) fits better, suggesting that the proportional odds assumption may not hold.\n")
  } else {
    cat("\nThe full proportional odds model (clm) fits better, suggesting that the proportional odds assumption holds.\n")
  }
}

```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_companyHospital")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_companyHospital")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_overall_init")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_overall_init")
#test_proportional_odds_lrt("safety_overall_init")
```
```{r}
model_complex("safety_overall_post")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_overall_post")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_tee")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_tee")
```



```{r}
model_complex("safety_people")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_people")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_data")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_data")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_purpose")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_purpose")
```

```{r}
model_complex("willingness")
#test_proportional_odds("willingness")
```

## Medical simple

```{r}
scores <- read.csv('./data/followup/scores-meds.csv', encoding=ENCODING,  header = TRUE)
scores$gender <- as.factor(scores$gender)
scores$age <- as.factor(scores$age)
scores$combined_IoT_Experience <- as.factor(scores$combined_IoT_Experience)
scores$combined_Medical_Experience <- as.factor(scores$combined_Medical_Experience)
scores$combined_CS_Experience <- as.factor(scores$combined_CS_Experience)
scores$education <- as.factor(scores$education)
scores$scenario_scenario <- as.factor(scores$scenario_scenario)
scores$scenario_complexity <- as.factor(scores$scenario_complexity)
names(scores) <- gsub(" ", "_", names(scores))  # Replace spaces with underscores


scores$safety_people <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_people, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_data <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_data, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_companyHospital <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_companyHospital, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_purpose <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_purpose, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_tee <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_tee, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))

scores$willingness <- ordered(scores$willingness, levels = c("Would not", "Maybe would", "Definitely would"))


scores$safety_overall_init <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_overall_init, levels = c("Not at all safe", "Somewhat safe","Completely safe")))
scores$safety_overall_post <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_overall_post, levels = c("Not at all safe", "Somewhat safe","Completely safe")))

scores$scenario <- factor(scores$scenario)

scores$EXPLN <- factor(scores$EXPLN, levels = c("No explanation", "Unsubstantial", "Hardware", "Trust"))
scores$FAQ <- factor(scores$FAQ, levels = c("No FAQ", "Hide", "Show"))
scores$scenario <- factor(scores$scenario, levels = c("MedicalComplex", "MedicalSimple", "IoTComplex", "IoTSimple"))
scores$EXPLN_rebinned <- factor(scores$EXPLN_rebinned)
scores$FAQ_rebinned <- factor(scores$FAQ_rebinned)

#scores$safety_companyHospital <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_companyHospital,                                       levels = c("Safe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Unsafe")))
scores_medicals= scores

```

```{r}
regression_model_binary <- function(dependent_var) {
  formula_str <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ EXPLN + FAQ + combined_Medical_Experience + combined_CS_Experience"))
  model <- glm(formula_str, data = scores, family = binomial)
  print(summary(model))
  print(Anova(model))
  plot_model(model)
  return(model)
}

model_complex <- function(dependent_var) {
  formula_str <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ EXPLN + FAQ + combined_Medical_Experience + combined_CS_Experience"))
  
  model_output <- clm(formula_str, data = scores, Hess=TRUE)
  print(model_output)
  print(summary(model_output))
  return()
}

test_proportional_odds <- function(dependent_var) {
  data <- regression_results
  formula_str <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ EXPLN + FAQ + combined_Medical_Experience + combined_CS_Experience"))
  model_clm <- clm(formula_str, data = scores, Hess = TRUE, nAGQ = 10)
  polr_model <- polr(formula_str, data = scores, Hess = TRUE)
  brant_result <- brant(polr_model)
  print(brant_result)
  p_values <- brant_result[, "probability"]
  cat("\nBrant Test Results:\n")
  print(brant_result)
  if (any(p_values < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    cat("\nThe Proportional Odds Assumption does NOT hold for at least one predictor.\n")
    cat("Consider using a partial proportional odds model or another approach.\n")
  } else {
    cat("\nThe Proportional Odds Assumption holds for all predictors.\n")
  }
}


```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_companyHospital")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_companyHospital")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_overall_init")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_overall_init")
```
```{r}
model_complex("safety_overall_post")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_overall_post")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_tee")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_tee")
```



```{r}
model_complex("safety_people")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_people")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_data")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_data")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_purpose")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_purpose")
```

```{r}
model_complex("willingness")
#test_proportional_odds("willingness")
```

## IoT simple

```{r}
scores <- read.csv('./data/followup/scores-iots.csv', encoding=ENCODING,  header = TRUE)
scores$gender <- as.factor(scores$gender)
scores$age <- as.factor(scores$age)
scores$combined_IoT_Experience <- as.factor(scores$combined_IoT_Experience)
scores$combined_Medical_Experience <- as.factor(scores$combined_Medical_Experience)
scores$combined_CS_Experience <- as.factor(scores$combined_CS_Experience)
scores$education <- as.factor(scores$education)
scores$scenario_scenario <- as.factor(scores$scenario_scenario)
scores$scenario_complexity <- as.factor(scores$scenario_complexity)
names(scores) <- gsub(" ", "_", names(scores))  # Replace spaces with underscores


scores$safety_people <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_people, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_data <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_data, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_companyHospital <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_companyHospital, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_purpose <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_purpose, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_tee <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_tee, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))

scores$willingness <- ordered(scores$willingness, levels = c("Would not", "Maybe would", "Definitely would"))


scores$safety_overall_init <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_overall_init, levels = c("Not at all safe", "Somewhat safe","Completely safe")))
scores$safety_overall_post <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_overall_post, levels = c("Not at all safe", "Somewhat safe","Completely safe")))

scores$scenario <- factor(scores$scenario)

scores$EXPLN <- factor(scores$EXPLN, levels = c("No explanation", "Unsubstantial", "Hardware", "Trust"))
scores$FAQ <- factor(scores$FAQ, levels = c("No FAQ", "Hide", "Show"))
scores$scenario <- factor(scores$scenario, levels = c("MedicalComplex", "MedicalSimple", "IoTComplex", "IoTSimple"))
scores$EXPLN_rebinned <- factor(scores$EXPLN_rebinned)
scores$FAQ_rebinned <- factor(scores$FAQ_rebinned)
scores_iots= scores
#scores$safety_companyHospital <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_companyHospital,                                       levels = c("Safe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Unsafe")))

```

```{r}
regression_model_binary <- function(dependent_var) {
  formula_str <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ EXPLN + FAQ + combined_IoT_Experience + combined_CS_Experience"))
  model <- glm(formula_str, data = scores, family = binomial)
  print(summary(model))
  print(Anova(model))
  plot_model(model)
  return(model)
}

model_complex <- function(dependent_var) {
  formula_str <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ EXPLN + FAQ + combined_IoT_Experience + combined_CS_Experience"))
  
  model_output <- clm(formula_str, data = scores, Hess=TRUE)
  print(model_output)
  print(summary(model_output))
  return()
}

test_proportional_odds <- function(dependent_var) {
  data <- regression_results
  formula_str <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ EXPLN + FAQ + combined_Medical_Experience + combined_CS_Experience"))
  model_clm <- clm(formula_str, data = scores, Hess = TRUE, nAGQ = 10)
  polr_model <- polr(formula_str, data = scores, Hess = TRUE)
  brant_result <- brant(polr_model)
  print(brant_result)
  p_values <- brant_result[, "probability"]
  cat("\nBrant Test Results:\n")
  print(brant_result)
  if (any(p_values < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    cat("\nThe Proportional Odds Assumption does NOT hold for at least one predictor.\n")
    cat("Consider using a partial proportional odds model or another approach.\n")
  } else {
    cat("\nThe Proportional Odds Assumption holds for all predictors.\n")
  }
}


```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_companyHospital")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_companyHospital")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_overall_init")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_overall_init")
```
```{r}
model_complex("safety_overall_post")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_overall_post")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_tee")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_tee")
```



```{r}
model_complex("safety_people")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_people")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_data")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_data")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_purpose")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_purpose")
```

```{r}
model_complex("willingness")
#test_proportional_odds("willingness")
```

## IoT complex

```{r}
scores <- read.csv('./data/followup/scores-iotc.csv', encoding=ENCODING,  header = TRUE)
scores$gender <- as.factor(scores$gender)
scores$age <- as.factor(scores$age)
scores$combined_IoT_Experience <- as.factor(scores$combined_IoT_Experience)
scores$combined_Medical_Experience <- as.factor(scores$combined_Medical_Experience)
scores$combined_CS_Experience <- as.factor(scores$combined_CS_Experience)
scores$education <- as.factor(scores$education)
scores$scenario_scenario <- as.factor(scores$scenario_scenario)
scores$scenario_complexity <- as.factor(scores$scenario_complexity)
names(scores) <- gsub(" ", "_", names(scores))  # Replace spaces with underscores


scores$safety_people <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_people, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_data <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_data, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_companyHospital <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_companyHospital, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_purpose <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_purpose, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))
scores$safety_tee <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_tee, levels = c("Unsafe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Safe")))

scores$willingness <- ordered(scores$willingness, levels = c("Would not", "Maybe would", "Definitely would"))


scores$safety_overall_init <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_overall_init, levels = c("Not at all safe", "Somewhat safe","Completely safe")))
scores$safety_overall_post <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_overall_post, levels = c("Not at all safe", "Somewhat safe","Completely safe")))

scores$scenario <- factor(scores$scenario)

scores$EXPLN <- factor(scores$EXPLN, levels = c("No explanation", "Unsubstantial", "Hardware", "Trust"))
scores$FAQ <- factor(scores$FAQ, levels = c("No FAQ", "Hide", "Show"))
scores$scenario <- factor(scores$scenario, levels = c("MedicalComplex", "MedicalSimple", "IoTComplex", "IoTSimple"))
scores$EXPLN_rebinned <- factor(scores$EXPLN_rebinned)
scores$FAQ_rebinned <- factor(scores$FAQ_rebinned)



    
    scores_iotc= scores
#scores$safety_companyHospital <- as.factor(ordered(scores$safety_companyHospital,                                       levels = c("Safe", "Neither safe nor unsafe","Unsafe")))

```

```{r}
regression_model_binary <- function(dependent_var) {
  formula_str <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ EXPLN + FAQ + combined_IoT_Experience + combined_CS_Experience"))
  model <- glm(formula_str, data = scores, family = binomial)
  print(summary(model))
  print(Anova(model))
  plot_model(model)
  return(model)
}

model_complex <- function(dependent_var) {
  formula_str <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ EXPLN + FAQ + combined_IoT_Experience + combined_CS_Experience"))
  
  model_output <- clm(formula_str, data = scores, Hess=TRUE)
  print(model_output)
  print(summary(model_output))
  return()
}

test_proportional_odds <- function(dependent_var) {
  data <- regression_results
  formula_str <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ EXPLN + FAQ + combined_Medical_Experience + combined_CS_Experience"))
  model_clm <- clm(formula_str, data = scores, Hess = TRUE, nAGQ = 10)
  polr_model <- polr(formula_str, data = scores, Hess = TRUE)
  brant_result <- brant(polr_model)
  print(brant_result)
  p_values <- brant_result[, "probability"]
  cat("\nBrant Test Results:\n")
  print(brant_result)
  if (any(p_values < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    cat("\nThe Proportional Odds Assumption does NOT hold for at least one predictor.\n")
    cat("Consider using a partial proportional odds model or another approach.\n")
  } else {
    cat("\nThe Proportional Odds Assumption holds for all predictors.\n")
  }
}

```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_companyHospital")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_companyHospital")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_overall_init")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_overall_init")
```
```{r}
model_complex("safety_overall_post")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_overall_post")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_tee")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_tee")
```



```{r}
model_complex("safety_people")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_people")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_data")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_data")
```

```{r}
model_complex("safety_purpose")
#test_proportional_odds("safety_purpose")
```

```{r}
model_complex("willingness")
#test_proportional_odds("willingness")
```

# Corrections

```{r}

run_BH <- function(dependent_var) {
  scenario_data <- list(
    MedicalSimple  = scores_medicals,
    MedicalComplex = scores_medicalc,
    IoTSimple      = scores_iots,
    IoTComplex     = scores_iotc
  )

  # ------- helper: compute Nagelkerke R² ---------
  compute_r2 <- function(full_model, data, dependent_var) {
    null_formula <- as.formula(paste(dependent_var, "~ 1"))
    null_model <- clm(null_formula, data = data, Hess = TRUE)

    ll_full <- as.numeric(logLik(full_model))
    ll_null <- as.numeric(logLik(null_model))
    n <- nobs(full_model)

    # Nagelkerke R2 formula
    r2 <- (1 - exp((2/n) * (ll_null - ll_full))) / (1 - exp(2 * ll_null / n))
    return(r2)
  }

  # -------- extract model terms per scenario --------
  get_model_terms <- function(df, scenario) {

    exp_var <- if (grepl("Medical", scenario))
      "combined_Medical_Experience" else "combined_IoT_Experience"

    f <- as.formula(paste(
      dependent_var,
      "~ EXPLN + FAQ +",
      exp_var, "+ combined_CS_Experience"
    ))

    model <- clm(f, data = df, Hess = TRUE)

    # compute Nagelkerke R²
    R2_Nagelkerke <- compute_r2(model, df, dependent_var)

    broom::tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, conf.level = 0.95) |>
      mutate(
        OR      = exp(estimate),
        OR_low  = exp(conf.low),
        OR_high = exp(conf.high),
        CI      = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", OR_low, OR_high),
        Scenario = scenario,
        R2_Nagelkerke = R2_Nagelkerke
      )
  }

  # -------- combine everything --------
  purrr::imap_dfr(scenario_data, get_model_terms) |>
    filter(term != "(Intercept)") |>
    group_by(term) |>
    mutate(q_value = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(
      Question = dependent_var,
      PreSig  = p.value <= 0.05,
      PostSig = q_value <= 0.05,
      Status = case_when(
        PreSig & !PostSig ~ "Lost significance",
        !PreSig & PostSig ~ "Gained significance",
        PreSig & PostSig  ~ "Stayed significant",
        TRUE              ~ ""
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(
      Question, Scenario, term,
      estimate, OR, CI, OR_low, OR_high,
      p.value, q_value, Status,
      R2_Nagelkerke
    )
}

write.csv(run_BH("willingness"), "BH_correction_2stStudy_will.csv", row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(run_BH("safety_overall_init"), "BH_correction_2stStudy_safety.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```
